name: mockflow-bridge
description: Connects any AI agent (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Ollama...) to a live MockFlow board open in the browser. The agent is the brain, the browser tab is the hands, the bridge is the nervous system between them.

scripts.check: node --check bin/mockflow-bridge.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/log.js && node --check src/debug.js && node --check src/ui.js && node --check src/catalog.js && node --check src/boardHub.js && node --check src/mcpEndpoint.js && node --check src/agents/index.js && node --check src/agents/claude.js && node --check src/agents/opencode.js && node --check src/agents/codex.js && node --check src/agentManager.js && node --check src/daemon.js && node --check src/stdioProxy.js && node --check browser/mockflow-bridge-client.js

author: A Produle Systems Pvt Ltd
